title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 419 E 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm; hours may vary based on staffing Email (541) 506-2600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 506-2600 TTY/TTD (800) 735-2900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Sherman and Wasco Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - FOOD HANDLER CARD ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - WATER QUALITY ASSURANCE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH LICENSED FACILITY INSPECTIONS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT
